items.rationale: This test module directly targets pipeline profiles and belongs in profile tests.

folders.inferred_purpose: Resume and compatibility tests for resumed or aliased workflow state should live here.

items.name: test_pre_m6_alias.py
items.rationale: A pre-M6 alias regression test plausibly belongs under resume compatibility tests.

folders.inferred_purpose: Storage-layer and persistence-related test modules should live here.

items.name: test_capsule_storage.py
items.rationale: This test module directly targets capsule storage behavior.

items.name: test_warrant_sources.py
items.rationale: Warrant source behavior appears storage-adjacent and fits this persistence test folder.

folders.inferred_purpose: Worker-specific regression and behavior tests should live here.

items.name: __init__.py
items.rationale: The package marker is appropriate if worker tests are imported as a test package.

items.rationale: A session cache regression test belongs with worker-related tests if the cache is worker behavior.
